title: The Log Is The Agent - Ishaan Sehgal, Omnara
summary: Ishaan Sehgal argues that agent identity and continuity should be grounded in durable, portable session logs rather than model frameworks or tools. He contends that as models commoditize, the differentiator shifts to append-only log infrastructure that enables agents to survive crashes, resume across devices, fork execution paths, and remain portable across model providers.
